name: startup-harness
description: Autonomous startup builder — takes an idea and builds the entire company: research, design, code, deploy, grow. 32 agents, 121 skills, magic-keyword skill detection, deterministic skill-chain enforcement, plugin-shipped hooks. Encapsulates all oh-my-claudecode functionality inline. Validated: built 3 startups (B2C, devtool, B2B SaaS) from single sentences.
